scripts.deploy: pnpm --filter @mcp-auth/shared run build && pnpm --filter @mcp-auth/auth-db run build && pnpm --filter @mcp-auth/mcp-tools run build && pnpm --filter @mcp-auth/auth-worker run build && wrangler deploy
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @mcp-auth/shared run build && pnpm --filter @mcp-auth/auth-db run build && pnpm --filter @mcp-auth/mcp-tools run build && pnpm --filter @mcp-auth/auth-worker run build && wrangler dev
